race.comment: A terrific race. HELLSING (9) has been narrowly beaten over a mile at Randwick his last three and the form reads strongly for this. Gibbons replaces the apprentice and will position him forward from the inside. Drops back 200m, but that's unlikely to stop him. GREEN FLY (6) was beaten just 1.4L in the Listed Carrington Stakes first up over 1400m and then tackled Open grade at Eagle Farm 22-days ago and delivered the prize. Dropped out early in both before coming home with a powerfully. Tim Clark rides and he'll be right in it with the extra fitness.  MAGNATEAR (5) missed 1L over this distance in a rich Magic Millions feature at the Gold Coast and then was beaten a long neck in a 100 at Rosehill where he led. Has to push forward from an awkward gate but has claims. COOL JAKEY (4) was last seen 8 days ago, beaten 2L in the Group 3 Liverpool City Cup over 1300m. Runs his best races this trip but he likes to position forward and the gate is cruel.
